title: Google Translate Adds AI Pronunciation Training as It Expands into Language Learning
description: Google Translate is moving beyond simple translation, introducing a new artificial intelligence feature designed to help users improve their pronunciation as the platform marks 20 years since its launch. The post Google Translate Adds AI Pronunciation Training as It Expands into Language Learning appeared first on Morocco World News .

title: Qualcomm Q2 Highlights: Double Beat, CEO Says AI Opportunity 'Reshaping Our Roadmap,' Data Center Details Coming
description: Qualcomm Inc (NASDAQ: QCOM ) reported second-quarter financial results that beat analyst estimates on Wednesday after market close. Here are the key highlights. Qualcomm Q2 Earnings Qualcomm reported second-quarter revenue of $10.60 billion, down 2% year-over-year. The revenue total beat a Street consensus estimate of $10.59 billion according to data from Benzinga Pro. Adjusted earnings per share were $2.65 for the quarter, beating a Street consensus estimate of $2.56. Revenue was $9.08 billion for the company's QCT segment, down 4% year-over-year. QTL segment revenue was $1.38 billion, up 5% year-over-year. QCT revenue breaks down as follows: Handset: $6.0 billion, -13% year-over-year Automotive: $1.33 billion, +38% year-over-year IoT: $1.73 billion, +9% year-over-year. This marked a record quarter for QCT automotive revenue. "We are pleased to deliver results in line ... Full story available on Benzinga.com

title: AI detection and repurposed drugs signal new era in food allergy research at Food Allergy Fund Summit
description: Food Allergy Fund Debuts Caregiver resource with Dr. Becky Kennedy, alongside breakthroughs in food allergy detection and treatment.

title: Lattice Wins BIG 2026 AI Excellence Award
description: Lattice Semiconductor (NASDAQ: LSCC), the low power programmable leader, today announced it was named a 2026 AI Excellence Award winner by Business Intelligence Group. Lattice was recognized for its Edge AI solution developed in collaboration with NVIDIA, which delivers a flexible, full-stack platform for real-time data acquisition and processing. The solution combines the Lattice CertusProTM-NX Sensor to Ethernet Bridge Board with the NVIDIA Holoscan Sensor Bridge.
